sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports anxiety and pressure, and a history of stress related to the holidays. He reports pain in the left hand. The patient reports pain. The patient reports anxiety. The patient reports pressure. The patient reports pain.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient's blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal. One plus non-pitting edema is bilaterally in the lower extremities. A slight two out of six systolic ejection murmur is appreciated. The patient's hemoglobin a1c is elevated at 8.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a history of type 2 diabetes and hypertension. The patient is managing diabetes. The patient reports anxiety and pressure.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor plans to increase the patient's metformin dosage to 1000 milligrams twice a day. The doctor plans to order a lipid panel. The doctor plans to order an echocardiogram. The patient plans to take a vacation.
